def positive_pandas_apply_with_simple_vectorizable_op():
    rule_id = "pandas_apply_with_simple_vectorizable_op"
    family = "mlops"
    severity = "info"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Simple DataFrame transforms are routed through apply(lambda) instead of vectorized operations."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
